title: Topic, Headers, and Alternate Routing · Independent Go Trial
summary: An independent Go integration team receives different topology, traffic, schema, tenant, dependency, and shutdown constraints and transfers the module into a new a deterministic Go routing and unroutable-decision table. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a deterministic Go routing and unroutable-decision table with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Design bounded dot-separated topic taxonomies whose stable semantic segments support exact, star, and hash matching; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Enumerate overlapping topic bindings and prove which queues receive one copy even when multiple bindings on the same queue match; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Use headers exchanges only with typed bounded metadata and explicit all-versus-any matching, not as a schema-free routing escape hatch; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Topic Segment Design
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab Go messaging team handles case 1210 during Go publisher supervisor losing one state notification. Build deterministic Go evidence to classify primary, alternate, returned, and invalid routing outcomes; keep message identity out of metric labels while preserving causal traces; then raise a broker resource alarm and halt new admission. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.
